description_long: This object is a rectangular patch of grass with a uniform, deep green coloration and a subtle texture that mimics the appearance of natural grass blades. The surface is flat and even, suggesting it is well-maintained and possibly intended for use in manicured urban environments such as parks or lawns. The grass coverage appears dense, with no visible gaps or bare soil, giving it a lush and healthy look. The edges of the patch are sharply defined, indicating it is a discrete section rather than a naturally blending area. There are no visible objects, debris, or irregularities on the surface, contributing to its clean and orderly appearance. The overall impression is of a synthetic or highly maintained grass patch suitable for public or private outdoor spaces.
description: A rectangular, dense, and well-maintained patch of deep green grass with a flat, clean surface and sharply defined edges.
description_view_0: A flat, rectangular grass patch with a uniform green texture and clearly defined front edge.
description_view_1: The grass patch appears identical to the front, with a consistent green surface and sharp boundary.
description_view_2: This view shows the same flat, dense grass surface, maintaining the rectangular shape and clear edge.
description_view_3: The patch remains visually consistent, with a lush green texture and no visible irregularities or debris.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_e: The grass patch is visually separated from adjacent elements, with sharp, well-defined boundaries and no blending into other surfaces.
